title: Extra Pastel Blocks
description: Extra Pastel Blocks is a Fabric mod that adds 30 different pastel color blocks, each with matching stairs and slabs, for a total of 90 new building blocks.
body:
# Extra Pastel Blocks

Extra Pastel Blocks is a Fabric mod that expands Minecraft’s building palette with a carefully curated collection of 30 pastel-themed colors, designed for clean, modern, and creative builds. Each color comes with a complete building set — full blocks, stairs, and slabs — resulting in a total of 90 new decorative blocks.

The mod focuses on aesthetic consistency and usability. All blocks are designed to blend naturally with vanilla materials while offering softer, more subtle color options that are ideal for interiors, modern bases, cities, and detailed builds. Matching stairs and slabs ensure smooth transitions and flexible design choices without breaking visual harmony.

To keep building comfortable and accessible, the blocks are intentionally easy to work with in survival mode, allowing players to focus on creativity rather than excessive grinding. The mod avoids unnecessary mechanics and keeps everything lightweight, stable, and server-friendly.

### ✨ Features

- 30 unique pastel color blocks
- 90 total blocks including matching stairs and slabs
- Clean, minimal color palette suitable for modern and decorative builds
- Seamless creative tab integration
- Light weight and performance-friendly
- Fully compatible with multiplayer and dedicated servers

### 🔧 Compatibility

- Built for Fabric
- Supports Minecraft 1.20.1 and Minecraft 1.21+
- Server-side compatible (clients can join without installing the mod)

### 📌 Notes

- Tool-based mining behavior is currently simplified for compatibility and ease of use
- Mining balance and tool requirements may be refined in future updates
- Actively maintained with plans for improvements and expansion
